017package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema;
018
019import java.util.*;
020
021/**
022 * Convenience class for representing a property that's an array of simple types.
023 *
024 * <p>
025 * An instance of this object is equivalent to calling...
026 *
027 * <p class='bjava'>
028 *    JsonSchemaProperty <jv>property</jv> = <jk>new</jk> JsonSchemaProperty(<jv>name</jv>)
029 *       .setType(JsonType.<jsf>ARRAY</jsf>)
030 *       .setItems(
031 *          <jk>new</jk> JsonSchema().setType(<jv>elementType</jv>)
032 *       );
033 * </p>
034 */
035public class JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray extends JsonSchemaProperty {
036
037   /**
038    * Constructor.
039    *
040    * @param name The name of the schema property.
041    * @param elementType The JSON type of the elements in the array.
042    */
043   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray(String name, JsonType elementType) {
044      setName(name);
045      setType(JsonType.ARRAY);
046      setItems(new JsonSchema().setType(elementType));
047   }
048
049   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
050   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addAdditionalItems(JsonSchema...value) {
051      super.addAdditionalItems(value);
052      return this;
053   }
054
055   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
056   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addAllOf(JsonSchema...value) {
057      super.addAllOf(value);
058      return this;
059   }
060
061   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
062   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addAnyOf(JsonSchema...value) {
063      super.addAnyOf(value);
064      return this;
065   }
066
067   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
068   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addDef(String name, JsonSchema value) {
069      super.addDef(name, value);
070      return this;
071   }
072
073   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
074   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addDefinition(String name, JsonSchema value) {
075      super.addDefinition(name, value);
076      return this;
077   }
078
079   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
080   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addDependency(String name, JsonSchema value) {
081      super.addDependency(name, value);
082      return this;
083   }
084
085   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
086   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addDependentRequired(String name, List<String> value) {
087      super.addDependentRequired(name, value);
088      return this;
089   }
090
091   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
092   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addDependentSchema(String name, JsonSchema value) {
093      super.addDependentSchema(name, value);
094      return this;
095   }
096
097   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
098   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addEnum(Object...value) {
099      super.addEnum(value);
100      return this;
101   }
102
103   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
104   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addExamples(Object...value) {
105      super.addExamples(value);
106      return this;
107   }
108
109   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
110   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addItems(JsonSchema...value) {
111      super.addItems(value);
112      return this;
113   }
114
115   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
116   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addOneOf(JsonSchema...value) {
117      super.addOneOf(value);
118      return this;
119   }
120
121   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
122   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addPatternProperties(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
123      super.addPatternProperties(value);
124      return this;
125   }
126
127   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
128   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addPrefixItems(JsonSchema...value) {
129      super.addPrefixItems(value);
130      return this;
131   }
132
133   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
134   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addProperties(JsonSchema...value) {
135      super.addProperties(value);
136      return this;
137   }
138
139   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
140   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addRequired(JsonSchemaProperty...value) {
141      super.addRequired(value);
142      return this;
143   }
144
145   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
146   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addRequired(List<String> value) {
147      super.addRequired(value);
148      return this;
149   }
150
151   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
152   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addRequired(String...value) {
153      super.addRequired(value);
154      return this;
155   }
156
157   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
158   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray addTypes(JsonType...value) {
159      super.addTypes(value);
160      return this;
161   }
162
163   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
164   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setAllOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
165      super.setAllOf(value);
166      return this;
167   }
168
169   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
170   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setAnyOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
171      super.setAnyOf(value);
172      return this;
173   }
174
175   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
176   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setConst(Object value) {
177      super.setConst(value);
178      return this;
179   }
180
181   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
182   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setContentEncoding(String value) {
183      super.setContentEncoding(value);
184      return this;
185   }
186
187   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
188   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setContentMediaType(String value) {
189      super.setContentMediaType(value);
190      return this;
191   }
192
193   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
194   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setDefinitions(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
195      super.setDefinitions(value);
196      return this;
197   }
198
199   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
200   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setDependencies(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
201      super.setDependencies(value);
202      return this;
203   }
204
205   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
206   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setDependentRequired(Map<String,List<String>> value) {
207      super.setDependentRequired(value);
208      return this;
209   }
210
211   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
212   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setDependentSchemas(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
213      super.setDependentSchemas(value);
214      return this;
215   }
216
217   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
218   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setDescription(String value) {
219      super.setDescription(value);
220      return this;
221   }
222
223   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
224   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setEnum(List<Object> value) {
225      super.setEnum(value);
226      return this;
227   }
228
229   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
230   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setExamples(List<Object> value) {
231      super.setExamples(value);
232      return this;
233   }
234
235   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
236   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setExclusiveMaximum(Number value) {
237      super.setExclusiveMaximum(value);
238      return this;
239   }
240
241   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
242   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setExclusiveMinimum(Number value) {
243      super.setExclusiveMinimum(value);
244      return this;
245   }
246
247   /**
248    * @deprecated Use {@link #setIdUri(Object)} instead.
249    */
250   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
251   @Deprecated(since = "10.0", forRemoval = true) // Parent method is deprecated
252   @SuppressWarnings({
253      "java:S1133" // Kept for Draft 04 backward compatibility, will be removed in future version
254   })
255   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setId(Object value) {
256      super.setId(value);
257      return this;
258   }
259
260   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
261   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMaximum(Number value) {
262      super.setMaximum(value);
263      return this;
264   }
265
266   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
267   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMaxItems(Integer value) {
268      super.setMaxItems(value);
269      return this;
270   }
271
272   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
273   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMaxLength(Integer value) {
274      super.setMaxLength(value);
275      return this;
276   }
277
278   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
279   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMaxProperties(Integer value) {
280      super.setMaxProperties(value);
281      return this;
282   }
283
284   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
285   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMinimum(Number value) {
286      super.setMinimum(value);
287      return this;
288   }
289
290   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
291   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMinItems(Integer value) {
292      super.setMinItems(value);
293      return this;
294   }
295
296   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
297   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMinLength(Integer value) {
298      super.setMinLength(value);
299      return this;
300   }
301
302   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
303   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMinProperties(Integer value) {
304      super.setMinProperties(value);
305      return this;
306   }
307
308   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
309   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setMultipleOf(Number value) {
310      super.setMultipleOf(value);
311      return this;
312   }
313
314   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
315   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setName(String value) {
316      super.setName(value);
317      return this;
318   }
319
320   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
321   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setNot(JsonSchema value) {
322      super.setNot(value);
323      return this;
324   }
325
326   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
327   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setOneOf(List<JsonSchema> value) {
328      super.setOneOf(value);
329      return this;
330   }
331
332   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
333   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setPattern(String value) {
334      super.setPattern(value);
335      return this;
336   }
337
338   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
339   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setPatternProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
340      super.setPatternProperties(value);
341      return this;
342   }
343
344   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
345   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setPrefixItems(JsonSchemaArray value) {
346      super.setPrefixItems(value);
347      return this;
348   }
349
350   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
351   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setProperties(Map<String,JsonSchema> value) {
352      super.setProperties(value);
353      return this;
354   }
355
356   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
357   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setReadOnly(Boolean value) {
358      super.setReadOnly(value);
359      return this;
360   }
361
362   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
363   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setRequired(List<String> value) {
364      super.setRequired(value);
365      return this;
366   }
367
368   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
369   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setSchemaMap(JsonSchemaMap value) {
370      super.setSchemaMap(value);
371      return this;
372   }
373
374   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
375   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setTitle(String value) {
376      super.setTitle(value);
377      return this;
378   }
379
380   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
381   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setType(Object value) {
382      super.setType(value);
383      return this;
384   }
385
386   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
387   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setUnevaluatedItems(JsonSchema value) {
388      super.setUnevaluatedItems(value);
389      return this;
390   }
391
392   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
393   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setUnevaluatedProperties(JsonSchema value) {
394      super.setUnevaluatedProperties(value);
395      return this;
396   }
397
398   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
399   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setUniqueItems(Boolean value) {
400      super.setUniqueItems(value);
401      return this;
402   }
403
404   @Override /* Overridden from JsonSchemaProperty */
405   public JsonSchemaPropertySimpleArray setWriteOnly(Boolean value) {
406      super.setWriteOnly(value);
407      return this;
408   }
409}
